Utilities

ml_workflow.utils.logging.get_logger(name: str, log_level: str = 'INFO', log_path: str | None = None, console_log: bool = True)[source]

Create and configure a logger.

Parameters:

  • name (str) – Logger name.

  • log_level (str) – Logging level (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR).

  • log_path (str or None) – Optional file path to write logs.

  • console_log (bool) – Whether to log to console.

Return type:

logging.Logger
